mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM users WHERE full_name LIKE '%' || #{fullName} || '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (id, email, password_hash, full_name, avatar_url, timezone, role, member_status, theme, is_active, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id}::uuid, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{fullName}, #{avatarUrl}, #{timezone}, #{role}, #{memberStatus}, #{theme}, #{isActive}, #{lastLoginAt}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, NOW()), COALESCE(#{updatedAt}, NOW()) )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET email = #{email}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, full_name = #{fullName}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, timezone = #{timezone}, role = #{role}, member_status = #{memberStatus}, theme = #{theme}, is_active = #{isActive}, last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
